details.test: Task 1: Search unicorn birthday kit with filters and add to cart
Task 2: Add cheapest large free-shipping kit from category listing
Task 3: Create multi-item set with quantity updates and validate totals
Task 4: Choose better unicorn kit by rating then price and add to cart
Task 5: Find high-rated birthday kit with 20+ pieces under $60 and add to cart
Task 6: Use estimator to select cheapest shipping option for cart
Task 7: Add two different items (5 + 1) resulting in 6 total quantity
Task 8: Apply promo code PARTY10 to a $20+ kit in cart
Task 9: Wishlist two items, add cheaper to cart, remove more expensive from wishlist
